willy-key.name: Willy's Back Room Key
willy-key.hold-up-message: You found the key to Willy's back room!
galaxy.not-worthy: You have not proven yourself to wield galactic power.
galaxy.worthy: You have proven yourself worthy of galactic power.
galaxy.quest.title: Galactic
galaxy.quest.description: Something ancient stirs beneath the desert pillars, but it deems you unworthy. Prove your skill by reaching level 50 of the Skull Cavern without placing any staircases.
galaxy.quest.objective: Reach Skull Cavern level 50 without staircases
config.section.boat.name: Boat Repair
config.section.boat.tooltip: Materials Willy needs to repair the boat in the back room.
config.boat-hardwood.name: Hardwood Cost
config.boat-hardwood.tooltip: How much hardwood is needed to repair the boat hull. Vanilla: 200.
config.boat-iridium.name: Iridium Bar Cost
config.boat-iridium.tooltip: How many iridium bars are needed to repair the boat anchor. Vanilla: 5.
config.boat-batteries.name: Battery Pack Cost
config.boat-batteries.tooltip: How many battery packs are needed to fix the boat ticket machine. Vanilla: 5.
config.section.other.name: Other Changes
config.qi-room.name: Unlock Qi's Walnut Room
config.qi-room.tooltip: Mr. Qi's room on Ginger Island West is open immediately instead of requiring 100 golden walnuts.
config.xp-modifier.name: XP Requirement Modifier
config.xp-modifier.tooltip: Multiplier on the XP needed beyond level 5 for skill levels 6-10, for all skills. 0.6 = 7710 XP from level 5 to 10 instead of 12850. At 1.0 the feature is disabled entirely to prevent conflicts with other mods.
config.free-mastery.name: Free First Mastery
config.free-mastery.tooltip: The first mastery can be claimed for free as soon as the mastery cave is unlocked.
config.weapon-gifts.name: Villager Weapon Gifts
config.weapon-gifts.tooltip: Villagers who own a themed weapon mail it to you once you reach enough friendship hearts.
config.weapon-gifts-hearts.name: Weapon Gift Hearts
config.weapon-gifts-hearts.tooltip: Friendship hearts needed before a villager mails you their weapon.
config.ring-gift.name: Harvey's Ring Gift
config.ring-gift.tooltip: Harvey mails you a Hot Java Ring once you reach enough friendship hearts.
config.ring-gift-hearts.name: Ring Gift Hearts
config.ring-gift-hearts.tooltip: Friendship hearts needed before Harvey mails you the Hot Java Ring.
weapon-mail.title: A Gift from {{name}}
ring-mail.Harvey: Hello,^I know you keep long hours between the farm and those caves, so I ordered you something from a medical supply catalog... okay, it was a coffee catalog. It's called a Hot Java Ring - wear it and the monsters you defeat will sometimes drop coffee.^Caffeine is no substitute for sleep, but I suppose it's better than fainting in a mineshaft.^Doctor's orders: stay warm and hydrated.^   -Harvey
weapon-mail.Abigail: Hey!^I heard you've been going down into the mines. SO jealous. Anyway, I want you to have my planchette. I originally got it to talk to spirits, but it turns out it's also great for slicing slimes.^Don't tell my mom.^   -Abby
weapon-mail.Alex: Hey, it's Alex.^This is the bat I used back when I first got serious about gridball. It's got a few good swings left in it, so I figured you could use it out there in the mines.^Swing from the hips!^   -Alex
weapon-mail.Elliott: Dear friend,^They say the pen is mightier than the sword. I've found this to be literally true of my pencil, which once fended off a particularly aggressive seagull.^May it serve your adventures as it has served my prose.^   -Elliott
weapon-mail.Haley: Hi!^Okay, so this is going to sound weird, but... this clothes iron? A bat flew into my room once and I flattened it with one swing. It works WAY better than you'd think.^Just don't bring it back covered in monster gunk. Actually, just keep it.^   -Haley
weapon-mail.Harvey: Hello,^As your doctor, I can't officially endorse crawling around monster-infested caves. But since I know you'll go anyway, please take my reflex mallet. It's meant for checking knees, but it swings surprisingly hard.^Stay safe down there.^   -Harvey
weapon-mail.Leah: Hi!^This is the whittling blade I've used on a hundred sculptures. It's carved a lot of beauty out of dead wood... maybe it can carve you a path through the mines, too.^Take good care of it.^   -Leah
weapon-mail.Maru: Hi!^I machined this wrench myself. It's rated for tightening hex bolts and, as I recently discovered, for bonking rock crabs.^Field test it for me and tell me everything!^   -Maru
weapon-mail.Penny: Hi,^It's not much, but this frying pan has gotten me through some tough nights, and it's sturdier than it looks. I'd feel better knowing you have something to defend yourself with down in those caves.^Please be careful.^   -Penny
weapon-mail.Sam: Yo!^This old guitar already survived being thrown off a roof (long story), so I figure it can survive the mines too. It's out of tune anyway.^Rock on!^   -Sam
weapon-mail.Sebastian: Hey.^In my Solarion Chronicles campaign there's a legendary mace that was lost for a thousand years. I made a real one. Don't ask how long it took.^It's yours now. Try not to lose it... that would be too ironic.^   -Sebastian
